title: Episode 1
overview: While hiding out in Hokkaido, Juzo rescues travelers from a bear. But his impressive fight puts him on the radar of the law and an illicit group.

title: Episode 2
overview: After defeating karate master Ichiro, Juzo narrowly evades the police. But someone is leaking his whereabouts to martial artists who want a piece of him.

title: Episode 3
overview: Training under Ranbo, Joze struggles to land a single hit. Meanwhile, Juzo confronts his inner beast and reflects on his dark past.

title: Episode 4
overview: Juzo comes face-to-face with the mysterious Sergeant, who blackmails him into joining the underground tournament KODOKU where he's forced to brawl.

title: Episode 5
overview: In the middle of Juzo's first match, Ryuoumaru lands a powerful strike that doesn't resemble any traditional sumo moves — awakening Juzo's inner beast.

title: Episode 6
overview: Former King of the Cage Mifune has a secret weapon: his son. Juzo must overcome Kaito's uncanny ability to read moves, if he wants to get to the finals.

title: Episode 7
overview: Bunshichi's quest for ultimate strength leads him to the Takemiya dojo. Juzo is set on confessing to Saeko — but Himekawa stands in his way.

title: Episode 8
overview: It's the ultimate face-off: Juzo Fujimaki versus Tsutomu Himekawa. The Takemiya style versus the Hokushinkan school. Has the lone wolf met his match?
